step_1_scanned_metadata.narrative_summary: The narrative details a young female's abduction experience in June 1960 in Alsace, France. While playing in the woods, she encountered a top-shaped, lighted craft, heard a voice calling her name, and entered on a light ramp. Inside, she observed a celebration among various beings, including an "older being" and a "taller helper," marking the completion of a research project. She conversed with a young female entity about everyday life. During an examination, a blood sample was taken from her nose for her to observe. She had vague memories of traveling in the ship over North America before her conscious memory returned upon seeing a deer. She later discovered blood drops on her blouse, which her father's camera recorded, and experienced eye irritation from the ship's light.

encounter_events.source_citation: she approached a top-shaped, lighted craft
encounter_events.ai_justification: The craft is described as top-shaped, matching U104 (bell, mushroom or top shape).

encounter_events.source_citation: heard a voice in her head, calling her naMe
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness hears a telepathic voice in her head, matching C110 (subject hears voice in his head).

encounter_events.source_citation: She entered on a conveyor-belt raMp Made of light
encounter_events.ai_justification: Entry via a ramp made of light matches E124 (levitation in beam of light) and U133.1 (ramp made of light). Coding E124 for the levitation/transport aspect.

encounter_events.source_citation: She entered on a conveyor-belt raMp Made of light
encounter_events.ai_justification: The ramp made of light matches U133.1 (ramp made of light).

encounter_events.source_citation: A celebration was under way with talk in high-pitched clicking sounds
encounter_events.ai_justification: High-pitched clicking sounds used by beings to communicate with each other matches C200 (beings communicate with each other using mumbling or unusual sounds).

encounter_events.source_citation: gaMes and Music, on the occasion of the older being froM her first abduction coMpleting a Major research project
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are celebrating with games and music, indicating they are happy, matching B914 (beings are happy in their work, or laugh).

encounter_events.source_citation: The taller helper was there as well, also a young feMale
encounter_events.ai_justification: The helper is described as a young female, matching B211 (feminine).

encounter_events.source_citation: The two girls talked together about dating, school and career plans
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being engages in friendly, familiar conversation about everyday topics, matching B900 (beings are friendly, polite, familiar in manner).

encounter_events.source_citation: The older beings wore the darkest clothing and the younger were deferential
encounter_events.ai_justification: Dimorphism associated with rank: older beings in darker clothing with younger beings being deferential matches B805 (dimorphism associated with rank).

encounter_events.source_citation: They wanted the witness to share in the celebration because she had contributed to the success of the project
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are helpful and considerate, inviting the witness to share in their celebration, matching B901 (beings are helpful and considerate).

encounter_events.source_citation: They used the incision instruMent to draw a blood saMple froM her nose
encounter_events.ai_justification: Drawing a blood sample matches X235 (beings take a blood or body fluids sample).

encounter_events.source_citation: this saMple seeMed intended for the girl to exaMine like a rare speciMen, to see how the witness had changed froM before
encounter_events.ai_justification: Interest in the witness's internal chemical composition and how it has changed matches B711 (interest in chemical composition, internal makeup).

encounter_events.source_citation: She had vague MeMories of going up in the ship and looking down over North AMerica
encounter_events.ai_justification: Vague memories of a journey imply a time lapse with incomplete recall, matching E200 (time lapse).

encounter_events.source_citation: going up in the ship and looking down over North AMerica
encounter_events.ai_justification: Looking down over North America from the ship matches W110 (otherworld seen approaching out a window, or earth departing).

encounter_events.source_citation: Her conscious MeMory returned when she saw a deer of unusual beauty
encounter_events.ai_justification: The gap between the journey and conscious memory returning implies doorway amnesia on leaving the craft, matching E201.

encounter_events.source_citation: a deer of unusual beauty, with eyes which reMinded her of the beings' eyes. It seeMed to say goodbye to her and disappeared
encounter_events.ai_justification: The deer with eyes reminiscent of the beings triggers an emotional response tied to the encounter location, matching A112 (witness feels alarmed on passing a certain place or encountering a reminder).

encounter_events.source_citation: she had drops of blood on her blouse, and though she had no MeMory of their origin
encounter_events.ai_justification: Unexplained blood drops on clothing consistent with the nose blood sample, matching A105 (spots or reddish marks like puncture wounds, soreness).

encounter_events.source_citation: She again experinced eye irritation froM the light within the ship
encounter_events.ai_justification: Eye irritation from the ship's light matches A100 (eye troubles: water, burn, vision impaired, sensitive to light).
